rationale: Both evaluations score the candidate identically (4/10) and reach the same core conclusion: a strong senior IC with no formal people-management experience, thin/dated mobile-platform exposure, and only tangential developer-tooling work, making them misaligned for the Engineering Manager role. The differences are reworded restatements of the same concerns plus run-to-run noise (e.g., '12+ years' vs '15+ years' phrasing, slightly different framing of dev-tools artifacts). None of the changes reference the location, geography, or any signal tied to Berlin vs Bucharest.
